degree: Master of Science, Natural Language Processing
description: Specialized in advanced computational approaches to language understanding, generation, and dialogue systems. Focused coursework in machine learning, deep learning, and data-driven linguistic analysis for NLP. Engaged in interdisciplinary collaboration across linguistics, cognitive science, and AI. Built a strong foundation in both theoretical concepts and practical applications of modern NLP techniques. Practical experience across departments in AI Engineering and AI Agents.
relevantCoursework: Deep Learning for Natural Language Processing
Data Science and Machine Learning Fundamentals
Advanced Machine Learning for Natural Language Processing
